mapper.select: SELECT id, request_id, user_id, agent_code, session_id, route_source, route_reason, route_policy_id, provider_id, model_id, provider_model_id, adapter_code, outcome, error_category, http_status, error_code, latency_ms, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, usage_available, cost_available, create_time FROM ai_model_invocation_log WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN outcome IN ('FAILED','ROUTING_FAILED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) failedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN usage_available = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) usageUnavailableCount, SUM(CASE WHEN usage_available = 1 AND cost_available = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) costUnavailableCount, SUM(CASE WHEN usage_available = 1 THEN COALESCE(prompt_tokens,0) ELSE 0 END) totalPromptTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN usage_available = 1 THEN COALESCE(completion_tokens,0) ELSE 0 END) totalCompletionTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN cost_available = 1 THEN CAST(prompt_tokens AS DECIMAL(38,0))*CAST(input_price_per_million_cent AS DECIMAL(38,0)) + CAST(completion_tokens AS DECIMAL(38,0))*CAST(output_price_per_million_cent AS DECIMAL(38,0)) ELSE 0 END) costNumerator FROM ai_model_invocation_log WHERE 1=1
SELECT latency_ms FROM ai_model_invocation_log WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY latency_ms ASC
